hero.title:
Learn what they
won't tell you.
hero.subtitle: Adulterated food, uninsured labor, hidden price hikes, environmental damage — see the facts through official data and community reports.
hero.webSubtitle: Discover community-verified facts about businesses, brands and products.

tagsis.source: Adulteration detection data from the Turkish Ministry of Agriculture and Forestry

location.title: See businesses near you
location.description: Your location is used only to show businesses close to you. It is never stored or shared.

impact.title: Your Impact
impact.emptyHeading: A trusted community is built together
impact.emptyBody: Review the places you know and share your experiences. Every contribution strengthens the community and brings you closer to the right to report facts.

cta.title: Everyone knows something
cta.body:
Adulteration, mistreatment, labor rights violations, environmental damage...
Share the truth you know and protect others.

join.label: Join the community
join.title: Know a fact? Let the community verify it.
join.body: Write reviews, report facts, vote. Reach 100 points to report facts yourself.

empty.verified: No verified facts yet. Be the first to report one.
empty.disputed: No claims in voting right now.
